entries.name: Epoch Coffee
entries.rationale: Highest Wilson score with strong review volume and consistent recent ratings.

entries.name: Houndstooth Coffee
entries.rationale: Strong Bayesian average with good volume. Slight recency dip from older reviews.

entries.name: Fleet Coffee
entries.rationale: Highest raw rating but lower volume reduces confidence. Pending verification.

evidence: Wilson score computation from 785 total reviews across Google and Yelp
